name: Stale Bread Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice bread into 12 slices.
2. Arrange 6 slices in a large greased baking pan.
3. Cover with all of the cheese and the remaining bread.
4. In a bowl, blend evaporated milk, water, eggs, mustard, onion, and seasonings until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture over the bread and let stand for at least 1 hour.
6. Bake in an oven set to 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes or until puffy and brown.
